title: 毎日王冠の後に・我等、此処に集いて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (As I thought, they really are amazing!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I was so overwhelmed by the pressure emanating
from Oguri and the others that I couldn't perform
as well as I'd hoped to!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Are you entering the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I intend to, yes. And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Glad to hear it. Bring it on, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and Oguri Cap reaffirm their mutual
desire to face off again, and the Mainichi Okan
draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(This should be the location Yaeno specified...
but she doesn't appear to have arrived yet.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here? Yaeno said—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Yaeno must have asked us both to come
here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming all the way out here. I
arranged this meeting so I could give you
something.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We'll meet at the upcoming autumn Tenno
Sho... Us and Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle our score there, up against the
spearhead of the Eternal Top Three. Once and for
all, we will see which of us is the finest racer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why not show the world that we are the true top three?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My sincerest apologies. I was simply unable to
contain the sheer joy I felt upon hearing so
wonderful a proposition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We shall settle this rivalry between us at the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...And what will you do, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I accept the challenge too! Let's see who can
seize the top spot!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I expected nothing less from my finest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (It's times like these that remind me...)
